mapper.select: SELECT * FROM vso_sale_model_option_policy WHERE sale_model_code = #{saleModelCode} AND row_valid = 1
SELECT * FROM vso_sale_model_option_policy WHERE sale_model_code = #{saleModelCode} AND option_code = #{optionCode} AND row_valid = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE vso_sale_model_option_policy SET option_family_code = #{optionFamilyCode}, sale_status = #{saleStatus}, option_price = #{optionPrice}, available_regions = #{availableRegions}, channels = #{channels}, bundle_with = #{bundleWith}, mutex_with = #{mutexWith}, marketing_title = #{marketingTitle}, marketing_image = #{marketingImage}, sort_weight = #{sortWeight}, modify_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND row_valid = 1
